ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used during the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric value */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric value */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity metric value */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score metric value */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC metric value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_url" TEXT /* URL where the dataset can be downloaded or accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the author */,
  "author_research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("model_evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version changes */,
  "version_changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluation being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_model_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("model_evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "model_evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluation being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being collaborated with */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("model_evaluation_id")
)
